name: Princess and Knight
short_description: Play the game and you'll be welcomed by many unique characters and their stories. The game "Princess And Knight" is an Tactical-RPG game that follows a funny and interesting story.
detailed_description:
Ver 9.1 Release notes

1. The character turn calculation system has been changed from cumulative character speed to character turn order within a single turn.

2. Fixed an issue where a level-up effect was displayed when casting summoning magic.

3. Fixed an issue where text in the buff window overlapped.

4. The skill switch keys have been changed from Page Up / Page Down to R / F. (PC)

5. The zoom in/out function has been changed from Ctrl + Mouse Wheel to Mouse Wheel only. (PC)

6. The fullscreen toggle key has been changed from F to Ctrl + F. (PC)

7. Other minor bugs have been fixed.

! Due to many updates, loading old save files may cause errors. If you are in the middle of a game, please use ‘Stage Retry’.


About the Game

Screams and blood…
An execution ground where sorrow never ends…
And she was always there.
Wearing the joyful smile of a child at a playground…
The people whispered behind her back, calling her
“the Blood Princess.”

What follows is her story—
and the memories of the man who wished for her happiness.
This is the tale of the last princess of the Kingdom of Farrell.
Please join her on her journey.


Game description :
✦The game "Princess And Knight" is an Tactical role-playing game that follows a funny and interesting story.
✦Play the game and you'll be welcomed by many unique characters and their stories.
✦The game has three difficulty levels.
✦Test your skills and luck at the difficulty level.
